headline: Evercore ISI Maintains an “In Line” Rating on Lowe’s Companies, Inc. (LOW)
summary: Lowe’s Companies, Inc. (NYSE:LOW) is one of the 10 Best Housing Stocks to Buy in 2026. On April 7, Evercore ISI raised its price target for Lowe’s Companies, Inc. (NYSE:LOW) to $250 from $245. It maintained an “In Line” rating on the shares. The analyst noted new projections for retail coverage. Separately, on April 24, […]
